title: tanacetum kittaryanum subsp. sclerophyllum
intro: Tanacetum kittaryanum subsp. sclerophyllum, also known as Sclerophyllous Pyrethrum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antifungal, and insecticidal properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and insect bites. The health benefits of Tanacetum kittaryanum subsp. sclerophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
